inputs.label: Logarithm Value
inputs.businessContext: The logarithm value (exponent) to compute the antilogarithm for.

businessContext_i18n.en: The logarithm value (exponent) to compute the antilogarithm for.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Logarithmuswert (Exponent) zur Berechnung des Antilogarithmus.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La valeur du logarithme (exposant) pour calculer l'antilogarithme.
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor del logaritmo (exponente) para calcular el antilogaritmo.

inputs.label: Base
inputs.businessContext: The base of the logarithm for the primary antilogarithm calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: The base of the logarithm for the primary antilogarithm calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birincil antilogaritma hesaplaması için logaritmanın tabanı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Basis des Logarithmus für die primäre Antilogarithmus-Berechnung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La base du logarithme pour le calcul principal de l'antilogarithme.
businessContext_i18n.es: La base del logaritmo para el cálculo principal del antilogaritmo.

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places to round the computed results.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places to round the computed results.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hesaplanan sonuçların yuvarlanacağı ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen zum Runden der berechneten Ergebnisse.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour arrondir les résultats calculés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para redondear los resultados calculados.

inputs.label: Scale Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier applied to the primary antilogarithm result for scaling purposes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier applied to the primary antilogarithm result for scaling purposes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçekleme amacıyla birincil antilogaritma sonucuna uygulanan çarpan.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator, der auf das primäre Antilogarithmus-Ergebnis zur Skalierung angewendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur appliqué au résultat principal de l'antilogarithme à des fins de mise à l'échelle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador aplicado al resultado principal del antilogaritmo para fines de escalado.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
